channel.title: Zhonghao Energy Industrial Material Insights
channel.description: Specification-led industrial material guidance for overseas buyers.

item.title: Magnesium and Automotive Lightweighting: A Materials-Sourcing View
item.description: A sourcing-oriented overview of where magnesium alloys may support automotive lightweighting and what primary-metal buyers should verify.

item.title: How to Read a Magnesium Ingot COA and Impurity Limits
item.description: A buyer guide to reading magnesium ingot COAs, comparing grade limits, identifying critical impurities and defining sampling and acceptance.

item.title: Magnesium Ingot Packaging, Storage and Shipment Checklist
item.description: A buyer checklist for magnesium ingot bundles, pallets, markings, dry storage, container planning, inspection and shipment documents.

item.title: How to Read Primary Magnesium Production and Export Data
item.description: A method for industrial buyers to interpret historical magnesium production and export statistics without confusing volume, timing and market availability.

item.title: How Raw Coal Quality Influences Semi Coke Performance
item.description: A buyer-focused explanation of how feed coal, carbonization and post-processing can influence semi coke chemistry and consistency.

item.title: Dry vs Wet Quenching in Semi Coke: What Buyers Should Confirm
item.description: A neutral comparison of dry and wet quenching considerations for semi coke buyers, including moisture, handling, consistency and evidence.

item.title: Industrial Uses of Semi Coke: Where Buyers Evaluate It
item.description: An overview of industrial situations in which buyers may evaluate semi coke, with the technical questions required before application.

item.title: What Moves Magnesium Ingot Prices? A Buyer Framework
item.description: A practical framework for understanding magnesium ingot quotations across date, grade, raw materials, production, demand, freight and trade terms.

item.title: Carbon Powder for Iron Foundry Carburizing: Buyer Checklist
item.description: How foundry buyers can define carbon powder requirements by furnace, base iron, chemistry, particle size, recovery and trial method.

item.title: Carbon Powder for Steelmaking Carbon Adjustment
item.description: A procurement framework for defining carbon adjustment material by steel grade, furnace, chemistry, particle size and recovery target.

item.title: PE for Blow-Molded Bottles and Containers
item.description: A buyer checklist for matching PE to blow-molded containers by size, contents, line, stiffness, impact, ESCR and compliance.

item.title: PE for Film and Flexible Packaging: Grade-Selection Inputs
item.description: The information needed to match HDPE, LDPE or LLDPE to a film line, package structure, sealing, optics and compliance requirements.

item.title: PE for Pipe and Extrusion: Start with the Standard
item.description: How to prepare a PE pipe or profile inquiry using the product standard, service conditions, process and producer qualification.

item.title: PP for Fiber and Nonwoven: Process-Led Grade Selection
item.description: A sourcing guide for PP fiber and nonwoven grades based on spinning route, melt flow, filtration, strength, softness and compliance.

item.title: PP for Injection Molding: How to Define the Grade
item.description: A framework for matching PP family and grade to a molded part using flow, impact, stiffness, shrinkage, appearance and compliance.

item.title: PP for Raffia and Woven Bags: Tape-Line RFQ Guide
item.description: The inputs needed to discuss PP raffia grades by tape line, drawability, tensile performance, bag construction and additives.

item.title: Semi Coke Packing, Moisture and Loading Questions
item.description: Questions to align bag format, net weight, markings, moisture protection, handling and loading before a Semi Coke order.

item.title: Semi Coke Particle Size and Fines: What to Put in the Order
item.description: A practical guide to defining Semi Coke size range, fines, oversize, sampling point and delivered acceptance.

item.title: Carbon Raiser: How to Review Fixed Carbon and Particle Size
item.description: A buyer-focused explanation of fixed carbon, sulfur, phosphorus, ash, alumina, moisture and size for Carbon Raiser RFQs.

item.title: COA and Industrial Material Inspection: A Buyer Checklist
item.description: Clarify product identity, batch, indicators, sampling, inspection responsibility and document timing before an industrial material order.

item.title: Formed Coke vs Conventional Coke: What Buyers Should Compare
item.description: Understand how product form, fixed carbon, ash, sulfur, moisture, size and calorific value shape a Formed Coke sourcing discussion.

item.title: How to Read an Industrial Material Specification Table
item.description: Learn to compare indicators, units, minimum and maximum limits, ranges, grades, size and order notes without mixing product data.

item.title: Industrial Material RFQ Checklist: Information Buyers Should Send
item.description: A complete RFQ checklist for semi coke and magnesium ingot buyers covering application, specification, quantity, packing, destination, inspection and terms.

item.title: Magnesium for Steel Desulfurization: Process-Fit Questions
item.description: A procurement overview of the questions required before qualifying magnesium for steel desulfurization systems.

item.title: Magnesium Ingots for Aluminum Alloying: Buyer Specification Guide
item.description: A guide to specifying primary magnesium additions for aluminum alloy production, covering grade, impurity balance, recovery, packing and inspection.

item.title: Magnesium Ingots for Die Casting: From Primary Metal to Alloy Requirement
item.description: How die-casting buyers can specify primary magnesium ingots by alloy route, impurity limits, melt practice, packing and inspection.

item.title: Mg99.95 vs Mg99.90 Magnesium Ingots: Grade Selection Guide
item.description: A procurement comparison of Mg99.95 and Mg99.90 magnesium ingots, including purity, impurity review, applications, documents and RFQ fields.

item.title: Packaging, Containers and Export Coordination for Industrial Materials
item.description: A practical framework for confirming packing format, markings, loading, destination and shipment documents in an industrial material RFQ.

item.title: Semi Coke Buying Guide: Specifications, Size and RFQ Checklist
item.description: A practical guide to comparing semi coke offers by application, chemistry, particle size, inspection, packing and commercial scope.

item.title: How to Read a Semi Coke COA: Sampling and Inspection Checklist
item.description: A buyer checklist for reading semi coke COAs, comparing test bases and defining sampling, laboratories and contract acceptance.

item.title: Semi Coke for Calcium Carbide Production: Procurement Checks
item.description: A procurement guide to reviewing carbon, ash, moisture, particle size and handling requirements for semi coke used in calcium carbide production.

item.title: Semi Coke for Ferroalloy Production: A Buyer Review Guide
item.description: How ferroalloy buyers can review semi coke chemistry, size, furnace fit, trial requirements and inspection before requesting a quotation.

item.title: Semi Coke for Silicon Metal Smelting: Selection Questions
item.description: Questions silicon metal buyers should ask about semi coke chemistry, ash composition, size, reactivity, resistivity and trial qualification.
